name: Orange Cheesecake and Strawberries
recipeIngredient: Large Navel orange, sectioned and membranes removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine vanilla wafers and cinnamon in a bowl.
3. Whisk egg white until foamy and blend it into the crumbs with a fork.
4. Spray a 9-inch springform pan with vegetable oil cooking spray.
5. Press the crumbs evenly on the bottom of the prepared pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 300°F.
7. In a food processor, combine cottage cheese, cream cheese, sugar, flour, orange juice, orange zest, and vanilla extract until smooth.
8. Spoon into the prepared crust and spread evenly with a rubber spatula.
9. Bake until set in the center (about 35-40 minutes).
10. Cool completely in the pan.
11. Refrigerate until chilled.
12. Loosen the sides of the cake with a small rubber spatula, remove the pan rim, and slice into wedges.
13. Serve with fruit on top. Makes 12 servings, each with 137 calories.
